topic: A person changing a flat tire on a car.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Loosening lug nuts at the wheel, front view.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Lifting the car with a jack and removing the flat tire, side-angle.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Tightening lug nuts on the spare and lowering the car, top-down.
parsed_generation.narration: An individual changes a tire in three steps across eight seconds. They loosen lug nuts, lift and remove the flat tire, then fit and tighten the spare as the car settles.

feedback:
The script covers the core tire-change actions and uses camera-angle cues, but it diverges from the gold standard in timing structure and level of procedural detail. Explicitly include the star-pattern hand-tightening of the lug nuts and the replacement with a spare in the second shot, and align the three segments to the gold standard's [00:00-00:03], [00:03-00:06], [00:06-00:08] cadence. Also remove the 'Shot' labels to match the bracketed-timestamp format of the gold standard.
Failed checks: example_alignment
strengths: Clear three-shot structure with distinct camera angles (front view, side-angle, top-down).
Concise, action-first narration that outlines the sequence.
fixes: Explicitly describe star-pattern lug-nut tightening and spare installation in the middle shot.
Align timestamps to [00:00-00:03], [00:03-00:06], [00:06-00:08] and format lines without 'Shot' prefixes to mirror the gold standard.
